classifications.phrase: Inflation has picked up more quickly than the RBA had expected
central forecast is for underlying inflation to increase further in coming quarters
The resilience of the economy is evident in the labour market
unemployment rate at a 14-year low of 4.2 per cent
A further pick-up in wages growth and broader measures of labour costs is expected
The Board will not increase the cash rate until actual inflation is sustainably within the…
it is too early to conclude that it is sustainably within the target range
The Board is prepared to be patient as it monitors how the various factors affecting…

payload.rationale: The statement signals a dovish hold, acknowledging inflation pressures but emphasizing patience and conditioning rate increases on sustained inflation within target, while noting uncertainties about persistence.
